experience.description: Leading technical execution for regional B2B support services.
achievements: Translated business requirements into technical implementation plans.
Led sprint planning and managed technical execution for development teams.
Refined backlog and troubleshot production issues based on incident data.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams including product owners and stakeholders.

experience.description: Conducted lectures on Software Quality Assurance and Testing methodologies.
achievements: Mentored students in practical QA projects using modern tools.
Shared industry best practices for automation and manual testing.

experience.description: Handling QA processes across multiple platforms including Android, iOS, Web, and APIs.
achievements: Automated functional testing using Katalon Studio and Playwright.
Established structured bug reporting and tracking processes with JIRA.
Implemented API testing automation with Postman and Newman.
Performed performance testing using Apache JMeter and integrated CI/CD with Jenkins.

experience.description: Assisted in test execution and documentation during major software releases.
achievements: Participated in QA meetings and contributed to defect reporting.
Supported manual testing efforts for various projects.
